section_miscategorizations.text: No numbness or tingling was noted.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Absence of numbness or tingling is typically a patient-reported symptom status (ROS). Unless explicitly documented as a neurologic exam finding, it more appropriately belongs in the Subjective section.

section_miscategorizations.text: Physical therapy is indicated to strengthen the lower extremities and recommend appropriate running exercises.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is an explicit management recommendation (a treatment plan), not part of the diagnostic assessment. It should be documented as an intervention in the Plan section.
